title: Team dashboard component for onboarding progress tracking
purpose: Displays team progress overview including member completion stats, category coverage, and topic completion heatmap for onboarding.
module_context: Exports a React functional component named TeamDashboard that uses React hooks and consumes onboarding API data.

steps.content: Access project, mode, and current user data from the onboarding context.
Initialize state for team members, topics, categories, and loading status.
Fetch team, topics, and categories data from the onboarding API when project changes.
Calculate total topics count from the fetched topics.
Compute category coverage statistics for each category based on team member exploration.
Render loading indicator while data is being fetched.
IF no team members exist, display a message indicating no data yet.
ELSE render team overview cards showing individual member progress.
Check if project data is available before proceeding with API calls.
Set loading state to true while fetching data.
Execute concurrent API calls to fetch team, topics, and categories.
Update component state with fetched data from all API responses.
Reset loading state to false after all data has been processed.
Map over each category to calculate completion statistics.
For each category, count how many team members have explored all its topics.
Return an object containing category name, topic count, members complete, and total members.
